# GitHub Automation

This directory contains repository-level configuration for GitHub:

- `CODEOWNERS` — automatic reviewer assignment.
- `FUNDING.yml` — sponsorship channels.
- `PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` — pull request template.
- `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/` — issue templates (bug, feature, standards RFC).
- `dependabot.yml` — dependency update policy.
- `workflows/` — GitHub Actions CI/CD workflows.

The workflows are:
- `ci.yml` — lint, build, and test on every push and pull request.
- `release.yml` — create GitHub Releases from version tags.
- `codeql.yml` — weekly and per-PR CodeQL security analysis.
